title: selaginella reflexa
intro: Selaginella reflexa, also known as reflexed spikemoss, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Selaginella, which belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Selaginella reflexa include its ability to reduce stress, improve cognitive function, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
